stepTitle: c) Write a function called correlation which takes in a table of data tbl containing the column names $$x$$ and $$y$$ and returns the correlation coefficient.
stepBody: What is Blank 1? See image. Only type what is in the blank, do not include what is provided. Do not use spaces unless absolutely necessary. Please use double quotes (" "), instead of single quotes (' ').##figure4.gif##
